description: CRE baseline experiment: three variants testing grammar divergence and knob perturbation. Base=speed/default, V1=stealth/default, V2=decoy/high-pressure. Expected: IC=1.0 ghost_mass=0.0 for all variants in MODE_B (correctly wired synthetic causal_links). Causal verdict: CLOSED across all pairs.

variants.description: Base variant: speed grammar, default knobs
Fork variant 1: stealth grammar, default knobs. A-grammar change only — same causal structure, different behavioral path.
Fork variant 2: decoy grammar, elevated pressure_gradient. Higher pressure → more A events, stronger E signal. Tests IC under structural arc expansion.
